# Shaping Frame for Claude

> A behavioral routing layer for clearer, more useful AI collaboration.

This site is the GitHub Pages landing page for the repository:
https://github.com/XxYouDeaDPunKxX/shaping-frame-for-claude

Canonical page:
https://xxyoudeadpunkxx.github.io/shaping-frame-for-claude/

Source branch:
https://github.com/XxYouDeaDPunKxX/shaping-frame-for-claude/tree/main

Primary source files:
- README: https://github.com/XxYouDeaDPunKxX/shaping-frame-for-claude/blob/main/README.md
- Skill package: https://github.com/XxYouDeaDPunKxX/shaping-frame-for-claude/raw/refs/heads/main/shaping-frame.skill
- Custom instruction: https://github.com/XxYouDeaDPunKxX/shaping-frame-for-claude/blob/main/CUSTOM_INSTRUCTION.txt
- License: https://github.com/XxYouDeaDPunKxX/shaping-frame-for-claude/blob/main/LICENSE

Machine-readable manifest:
https://xxyoudeadpunkxx.github.io/shaping-frame-for-claude/raw-manifest.json

Summary:
Shaping Frame for Claude is a compact interaction protocol / skill designed to help Claude choose the right collaboration mode, reduce ambiguity, and provide more useful outputs across exploratory, technical, and practical tasks.
